originalAlarm.description: Potential leak of memory pointed to by '__mod_11'

sanitizedDescription: Potential leak of memory pointed to by 'mod'
reasoning: mod is allocated at L39 (ptr->mod path) and not freed before function exit at L69. This is a genuine memory leak on all configs (PC=true, simplifies to tautology). No // ERROR marks this as a VBDB-known bug, so it is new. PC=true is correctly constrained (leak exists regardless of configuration).
